name: FARBER DISEASE

demographics.Histo: foam cell granulomas; lipid storage of neuronal tissue (accumulation of ceramide +

dominant_finding: capsular distension of multiple joints (hand, elbow, knee)
discriminating_features: capsular distension of multiple joints (hand, elbow, knee)
juxtaarticular bone erosions from soft-tissue granulomas

general: capsular distension of multiple joints (hand, elbow, knee)
juxtaarticular bone erosions from soft-tissue granulomas

clinical.Prognosis: death from respiratory failure within 2 years
